title: Balanced Never Heard Of It
description: Balanced Never Heard Of It (BNHOI) is a total conversion mod designed to significantly increase the difficulty and depth of Minecraft.
body:
# Balanced Never Heard Of It (BNHOI)

Balanced Never Heard Of it or BNHOI for short is a total conversion mod for mineraft 1.21 that modififes multiple mechanics of the game to make it way more difficult, this mod is of course heavily inspired by Better Than Wolves (BTW) and Minecraft Is Too Easy (MITE). Some of these changes include:

![An orange figure with bright yellow eyes walking in the some grass fields.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca5b75aa7350d3685aac995ee63da53c01017eff.png)


This Mod affects the game in many unique ways while keeping the game fun and not unfairly hard and annoying, I personally recommend and invite you playing the mod to discover all this unique features yourself, if you somehow are interested in beating the mod (getting a copper workbench) <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/y3PzzECfIY4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Here is a stream that I made with a friend beating the game from the start, the stream is hispanic and its on version 1.5.1 

# KEEP IN MIND!
This mod is still on alpha, meaning there is probally bugs around it.

I very hope you enjoy this unique mod.

![A copper man searching to find any prey while steve is panning gravel on an improvisional home.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69f91331ab77c380b61cd038e1db28bcace3a2d5.png)
